prompt: Create a high-detail dark Eastern fantasy weapon concept poster featuring exactly two ancient Chinese poleaxe or halberd-like weapons crossed in an X composition, fully visible from blade tips to handle ends, centered and symmetrical like a collectible sect-treasure weapon design sheet. The two weapons should contrast as one white/silver weapon on the left and one black/dark steel weapon on the right. Each weapon has a long ornate shaft, dragon-scaled metal carving, a monstrous dragon-head transition near the blade, glowing red gem-like eyes, and a huge crescent axe blade curving outward at the top; the left blade is bright polished silver with icy white highlights and intricate engraved filigree, while the right blade is blackened steel with jagged demonic edges, dark blue-gray highlights, and glowing deep red vein patterns. The crossed handles meet at the center lower half, forming a dramatic X, with pointed spear-like pommels at the bottom. Use a premium dark fantasy + Chinese ink wash + engraved metal concept art style, extremely detailed, cinematic, sharp, moody, and symmetrical. Background: cold gray matte mist texture with a large circular black ink-brush talisman or magic formation behind the weapons, concentric rough brush rings and splattered ink. Add black plum blossom branches spreading around the lower sides and behind the weapons, with many dark red plum blossoms and scattered red petals floating across the scene. Lighting should be soft but dramatic, with metallic rim light, subtle glow from red accents, volumetric mist, high contrast, no characters, no text, no watermark. Customizable elements: ancient Chinese dragon halberds, white silver, black steel with red veins, large circular ink-brush talisman, dark red plum blossoms.
